title: Psychrogeton andryaloides
taxonomy: Psychrogeton andryaloides is classified within the plant family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and morphological features, which are typical of the Asteraceae family. More specifically, Psychrogeton andryaloides belongs to the subfamily Carduoideae, a subfamily of the Asteraceae family characterized by thistle-like plants. Within the subfamily Carduoideae, Psychrogeton andryaloides is part of the tribe Cardueae, a group of plants that share similar characteristics and are often thistle-like in appearance. This classification provides a framework for understanding the evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics of Psychrogeton andryaloides and other plants within the Asteraceae family.
